author: Virendra Prajapat
title: 5.0 out of 5 stars Stylish, Spacious & Reliable — A Perfect Travel Companion
body: The Skybags Cardiff Polyester 63.5 cms Red Travel Duffle (DFTCAR62ERED) is a great blend of style, durability, and practicality, making it an excellent choice for both short trips and extended travel. Design & Build Quality: The first thing that stands out is its vibrant red color, which gives it a bold and modern look. Made from high-quality polyester, the bag feels sturdy and durable, capable of handling regular use without wear and tear. The stitching is strong, and the zippers glide smoothly, adding to the overall premium feel. Storage & Capacity: With a size of 63.5 cm, this duffle offers ample space for clothes, shoes, and travel essentials. It easily accommodates packing for a 3–5 day trip. The main compartment is spacious, and additional pockets help keep smaller items organized. Portability & Comfort: The bag comes with both carry handles and an adjustable shoulder strap, providing flexibility in carrying. Even when fully packed, it remains relatively comfortable to carry. The lightweight design is an added advantage for travelers who want to avoid extra bulk. Durability: Skybags has done a good job ensuring the material can withstand rough handling during travel. Whether you’re using it for road trips, gym sessions, or short vacations, it holds up well over time. Pros: • Eye-catching and stylish design • Spacious interior with good organization • Durable polyester material • Lightweight and easy to carry • Smooth and reliable zippers Cons: • Lacks trolley wheels (not ideal for heavy packing) • Limited external compartments Final Verdict: The Skybags Cardiff Red Travel Duffle is a dependable and stylish option for travelers looking for a spacious yet lightweight bag. It offers great value for money and is especially suitable for short trips, gym use, or weekend getaways. Rating: 4.5/5 Read more

author: Madhu
title: 1.0 out of 5 stars Disappointed with the American Tourister Trolley
body: I recently purchased the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley, and I must say that I am thoroughly disappointed with its performance. Despite its promising features, this suitcase failed to meet my expectations in several key areas. First and foremost, the build quality of this trolley is subpar. The polypropylene material used feels cheap and flimsy, making me question its durability. Within just a few uses, I noticed visible scratches and scuff marks on the surface, which is unacceptable for a product that is meant to endure the rigors of travel. Furthermore, the wheels on this trolley are a major letdown. They lack smoothness and maneuverability, making it a struggle to navigate through crowded airports or uneven surfaces. The wheels frequently jammed and became stiff, adding unnecessary frustration to my travel experience. I expected better performance from a reputable brand like American Tourister. Additionally, the handle mechanism was poorly designed. It felt flimsy and had a noticeable wobble, which made it uncomfortable to pull the trolley. I had concerns about its longevity and worried that it might break during my travels. A reliable handle is essential for a check-in suitcase, and the American Tourister Ivy failed to deliver in this aspect. Lastly, the overall aesthetics of the trolley were uninspiring. The design lacked innovation and appeared outdated. For the price I paid, I expected a more stylish and modern look. It is disappointing when a product not only underperforms in terms of functionality but also fails to make a positive impression visually. In conclusion, the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley fell short of my expectations. Its poor build quality, subpar wheels, flimsy handle, and unappealing aesthetics make it difficult for me to recommend this product. I regret my purchase and would advise potential buyers to explore other options before settling for this particular suitcase Read more

The wheels are smooth and glide well in ramps and even on slightly uneven and not so smooth surfaces also. The compartmentation management is up to mark...not excellent and a small pouch for daily use items could have been well deserved. The quality is sturdy and the telescopic handle is also quite free and strong for movement. The body is not very strong but since it is PP material....I would rate it 5 star in this price. It is not Scratch resistant...but the black color looks nice and very elegant for frequent uses. Read more

author: Nilima Bajpai
title: 5.0 out of 5 stars Nice
body: Recently purchased this trolley Bag and I must say that it is a solid choice for travelers who seeking a lightweight yet durable option. Its hard-shell design ensures protection, while the 8 spinner wheels make maneuvering easy. The bag's compact size fits perfectly for short trips, and the combination lock adds a layer of security. The vibrant red color gives it a stylish touch, and the polycarbonate material makes it tough yet light. Overall, it's a reliable option for those looking for convenience and sturdiness. Read more

product_title: VIP Polypropylene (PP) Quad Active Check-in 66 Cm (Medium) 8 Spinner Wheels Trolley Bags for Travel, Hard Case Lightweight Bag with Combination Lock, Tough Suitcase for Travel (Red)
author: sameer Thakur
title: 5.0 out of 5 stars Must buy
body: Ordered cabin size bag. It is made up of Polypropylene and not of polycarbonate. Polycarbonate is a stronger material but the bags of Safari I checked were having weight of 2.5 kg and flimsy build. This bag is having weight of 3.5 kg. Sturdy. Zipper is nice, inside lining is also nice. Colour is turquoise blue, looks better than Red . Prone to scratches as the material is soft so you have to handle it carefully. Use padlock for security as number lock can be opened easily if you know the trick. My daughter packed her clothes for 8 days Manali winter trip including 1 pair of boots in this bag (No puffer jacket). Highly recommended. Read more
